# Cross-package wrapper function calls resolve successfully when types match.

check-templates ./...
! stderr .

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- render/render.go --
package render

import (
	"html/template"
	"io"
)

func Template(tpl *template.Template, w io.Writer, name string, data any) error {
	return tpl.ExecuteTemplate(w, name, data)
}
-- handlers/handler.go --
package handlers

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"

	"example.com/app/render"
)

var (
	//go:embed *.gohtml
	source embed.FS

	templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))
)

type Page struct {
	Title string
}

func HandleIndex(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = render.Template(templates, w, "index.gohtml", Page{Title: "Home"})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- handlers/index.gohtml --
<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>
